place.summary: Tsing Ma Bridge functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong International Airport. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

compare_candidates.poi_name: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong International Airport
opportunity_cards.detail: Tsing Ma Bridge frequently appears alongside Hong Kong International Airport, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Victoria Harbour
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Tsing Ma Bridge to Victoria Harbour, with relatively strong journey experience.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: Tsing Ma Bridge draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.

journey_examples.trajectory: Hong Kong International Airport -> Lamma Island -> Tsing Ma Bridge
